changelog: v1.0.127 moves the website/domain routing to Render and verifies it live, polishes Pricing/Gift/Robux UI text, adds the v127 Discord/OG preview image, adds Offline QA mode, fixes tutorial targets and transitions, removes generic Instant Twisted while keeping Right/Left InstantTwi, hardens overlay Alt+Tab behavior, improves Roblox MS/FPS detection wording, allows safer FPS limit apply/reset, improves Loop Dash/Stop All cancellation responsiveness, and polishes Shop/Feedback/Creator Place UI.
